_note: Export the live n8n workflow here.
_instructions: 2. Open the Fireflies Summary Pipeline workflow
3. Click the three-dot menu (top right) → Download
4. Save the downloaded .json file as this file (n8n-workflow-export.json)
5. Before committing: remove any hardcoded credentials, API keys, or internal email addresses from the JSON
6. Replace sensitive values with placeholder strings like '<FIREFLIES_API_KEY>', '<GOOGLE_DRIVE_FOLDER_ID>', '<INTERNAL_EMAIL>'
